title: Travel on a Budget

segments.text: Cheap travel isn't about suffering — it's about being flexible.
Book flights mid-week and travel in the shoulder season.
Use local public transport instead of taxis.
Eat where the locals eat — markets, food courts, neighbourhood diners.
Stay in family-run guesthouses or hostels with private rooms.
And remember: the best memories almost never come from the most expensive experiences.

And remember: the best memories almost never come from the most expensive experiences.
